bead.title: federation: hub HTTP API + --hub-mode gating + ts-net policy + version handshake
bead.description: Hub-side HTTP API: register, heartbeat, deregister. --hub-mode flag gates the API. ts-net required by default; explicit --federation-allow-plain-http opt-out (hub-mode only, warned). Version handshake at registration: reject incompatible major; degrade compatible-but-newer.
bead.acceptance: 1. /api/federation/register, /heartbeat, /deregister endpoints exist. 2. --hub-mode flag wired. 3. ts-net default with opt-out flag (warned). 4. Version handshake. 5. Tests cover all four behaviors.
